name: Quick Fajitas with Pico De Gallo
recipeIngredient: 1 pound well-trimmed boneless sirloin steak, 3/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
Marinade:
2 tablespoons fresh lime juice
2 teaspoons vegetable oil
2 large cloves garlic (crushed)
Pico de Gallo:
1 cup seeded, chopped tomato
1/2 cup diced zucchini
1/4 cup chopped fresh cilantro
1/4 cup prepared salsa
1 tablespoon fresh lime juice
1. Place beef steak in plastic bag; add marinade ingredients, turning to coat.
2. Close bag securely and marinate in refrigerator 20-30 minutes, turning once.
3. Meanwhile, in a medium bowl, combine Pico de Gallo ingredients; mix well.
4. Remove steak from marinade; discard marinade. Place steak on rack in broiler pan so surface of meat is 2-3 inches from heat.
5. Broil 9-12 minutes for medium rare doneness, turning occasionally.
6. Trim fat from steak; carve crosswise into very thin slices.
7. Serve beef in tortillas with Pico de Gallo. Makes 4 servings.
